race.comment: MAGNIFICENT STORM NZ (1) was brave when he led and kept finding for third in last week's Nullarbor. That was his first defeat for the year having made it five wins on the trot when leading from wide out in the Governors Cup two back. Has the speed to take full advantage of the ace draw. That could see him had to catch. MINSTREL NZ (8) had to work when midfield as favourite in the Nullarbor. Came from this barrier and worked but was too strong in winning here prior. All class and can bounce back. NSW raider MAX DELIGHT (5) turned back the clock with his brave Nullarbor win last week. Had a perfect one-one trail there and draws a little wider so may not get the same favours but he is the only one proven at this longer distance. GOLDEN LODE NZ (10) was the eye-catcher in the Nullarbor, flashing late for a close second. Draws for a trail and the longer distance may suit. TRIEDTOTELLYA (2) is a query off a setback but brings terrific form from Tassie. Should get his chance from the low draw.
